overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit downtown district at night. The character moves past crowds of NPCs, food vendors, and digital billboards before approaching NCPD police officers stationed near an armored vehicle in an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian street with food vendors

events.description: passing by a group of standing NPCs that temporarily block the right side of view
slight turn to the left while continuing forward past the El Camino stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk through a crowd of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Massive screen displaying fiery orange advertisement high above the street
Futuristic green neon-lit structural archway spanning the pedestrian street
Illuminated food stall signage with pink and white neon lights
Food vendor stall with red neon 'BURRITO' signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a crowded neon-lit sidewalk at night, passing groups of pedestrians and food vendors. A massive digital billboard and green neon arch dominate the view ahead, while the character navigates through moderate crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with movie poster displays

events.description: moving past the burrito stand and entering the covered walkway section with illuminated posters
exiting the covered area into the more openly lit plaza with wider sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated movie poster displays and continuing toward the open plaza

notable_agents.action: NPC in green jacket standing near the movie poster wall

entered.detail: Illuminated display wall featuring movie advertisements with green neon borders

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered walkway lined with illuminated movie posters, transitioning from the crowded vendor area toward an open plaza. The green neon arch remains visible in the distance while the crowd thins out.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with NCPD checkpoint

events.description: entering the open plaza area with wet reflective pavement and tall building billboards
approaching the NCPD armored vehicle parked at the plaza edge with officers standing guard

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the NCPD police checkpoint

notable_agents.action: NCPD armored vehicle parked with 'CAUTION NCPD' displayed on side

entered.detail: Black armored police vehicle with scrolling cyan text displaying 'CAUTION NCPD'
Towering building facades covered with multiple vertical digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza with wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings. The character approaches an NCPD checkpoint where an armored police vehicle is parked with officers standing nearby.

events.description: slowing down and stopping near the NCPD officers to observe them
camera moves very close to the NCPD officer, filling the frame with mechanical details

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the NCPD officers up close, examining their mechanical details

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing guard with mechanical limbs and glowing helmet lights
Second NCPD officer standing near the vehicle with weapon visible

segments.scene_description: The character slows down and approaches the NCPD officers for a close inspection. The camera focuses on the mechanical details of the cyborg officers and their glowing helmet lights, with the armored vehicle now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling neon-lit district that gradually opens into a sterile police checkpoint. It begins on a crowded sidewalk where the character navigates past food vendors and pedestrians under the glow of a massive digital billboard and a green neon arch. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered walkway lined with illuminated movie posters, causing the crowds to thin as the path leads toward an open plaza. The camera then emerges onto wet asphalt reflecting the city lights before approaching an NCPD checkpoint marked by a parked armored vehicle. Finally, the movement slows to a halt, focusing on the mechanical details and glowing helmet lights of the cyborg officers standing guard.
